title: Trondheim Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Trondheim, with a Z-Score of -3.29. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Trondheim are extremely cold, with a high demand for heating. 
 The relative humidity is at 67% and the wind speed is moderate at 5.4 km/h. 
 The heating degree days (HDD) are at 12.5 GG, indicating a high energy demand.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary actions to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
